channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Platner withdraws from Senate race following rape allegation
item.description: Graham Platner exited the Maine Senate contest, allowing Democrats to select a new candidate to challenge Senator Susan Collins.

item.title: The Long March out of the Gender Clinics
item.description: A call for genuine regret from those who echoed the false narratives of this movement.

item.title: And the Inaugural 'Supreme Flower of Nitwittery' Awards Go To . . .
item.description: Judges should not act as curators, Churchill is both valuable and erased, and Etruscan art stands out in Rome.

item.title: Key Developments in the Charlie Kirk Assassination Trial, Day 3
item.description: Tyler Robinson's surrender and Lance Twiggs' police interview were central to Wednesday's proceedings.
